name: Vidanga
usesInAyurveda: Tridoshic Modulation: Pacifies Vata and Kapha.
mainMedicinalUses: Premier Ayurvedic herb for intestinal worms.
Assists in weight loss by scraping fat.
plantProfile: Climbing shrub native to hilly regions of India.
preparationMethods: Powder mixed with castor oil or honey for worms.
